case_title: HENRY ARANA VS. SUSY LABRO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER LABRO, SUSY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED A RECESS SO PLAINTIFF COULD CALL THE PROCESS SERVER AS A WITNESS. AFTER RECESS, DEFENDANT WAS ABSENT. WITNESS ERIC MONTOYA WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT, HAVING HEARD THE TESTIMONY, DENIED DEFENDANT SUSY LABRO'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: PATRICIA EVEZICH, CSR# 1193
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LABRO, SUSY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

DEFENDANT SUSY LABRO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Off Calendar, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON 12/4/2002. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Susy Labro specially appearing in propria persona, moving to quash the service of summons or stay or dismiss
John P. Zanghi, Esq., 241-1166, for plaintiff and opposing party
A R G U E D and the Court ordered a recess so plaintiff could call the process server as a witness.
After recess, defendant was absent. Witness Eric Montoya was sworn and examined on
behalf of the plaintiff. The Court, having heard the testimony, DENIED DEFENDANT SUSY LABRO's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/301/MD) Reporter: Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
